paper.description: Warm off-white. Body color. ~80% of any composition.

ink.description: Warm black. Only type color. No greys for body copy.

accent-quiet.description: Warm grey. Secondary text and hairline rules only.

accent-rare.description: Rust orange. Cap at 5% of composition. One element max.

surface-secondary.description: Slightly darker tone. Cards, elevated panels.

flinch_anchor: Pocket-2024 orange (#EF4056). The chosen rust reads warm, not loud.
